name: Lenia — Multi-Kernel Continuous Cellular Automata
description: Self-organizing alien organisms from pure mathematics. Multi-channel activator-inhibitor dynamics, GPU convolution, emergent locomotion. Context source for RepoScripter2 and ShaderForge.

lenia.glsl.description: Full simulation — Buffer A (sim) + Image (display). Paste into Shadertoy; set Buffer A iChannel0 to itself.

lenia_raymarch.glsl.description: 3D volumetric raymarched visualizer. Paste directly into any iTime/iResolution GLSL runner. No textures needed.

shaders/kernel_vis.glsl.description: 2×2 panel kernel shape visualizer. Debug and tune kernel parameters visually.

shaders/lenia_procedural.glsl.description: Procedural Lenia aesthetic — no simulation, instant organisms. 5 render modes via #define RENDER_MODE.

lenia.js.description: 3-channel GPGPU sim with ping-pong FBOs. Runs in RepoScripter2 sandbox.

lenia_5ch.js.description: 5-channel GPGPU sim. Colony organisms orbiting shared center. Richer W matrix.

lenia_cpu.js.description: Pure CPU reference implementation. No WebGL. Float32Array simulation. For prototyping.

ai_hints.primary_vibe: biological-alien luminous organisms on void, multi-channel chemical dynamics, activator-inhibitor locomotion, phosphorescent trails
ai_hints.render_target: Three.js WebGL2 with GPGPU ping-pong FBOs, channel composite pass, additive blending
render_modes: 0: Chromorbium — color cycling, breathes, channels pulse at offset phases
1: Orbium swarm — pure magenta gliders, clean wakes
2: Volvox colony — gold/cyan mandala, orbit ring
3: Growth boundary — heat-map dominant, orange pulse at active growth
4: Minimalist — near-white organism on deep navy, pure form
interaction_hooks: mouse click: inject organism concentration at cursor
mouse drag: pour continuous concentration stream
scroll wheel: adjust timestep (slow → chaos → white noise)
key 'm': mutate growth parameters mid-run (personality shift)
ai_prompts: multi-channel lenia organism, 3 chemical layers, activator-inhibitor dynamics, organism gliding on black void, channel composite RGB, magenta body cyan excitation violet inhibition
chromorbium variant, 4-channel lenia, internal oscillation, channels pulse at different phases, biological membrane, breathing organism aesthetic
volvox colony lenia, 4 organisms orbiting shared center, wake trails, additive blending, electric magenta and cyan on absolute black, rotating mandala
lenia growth boundary visualization, heat map overlay showing active growth regions in orange, organism core in white, inhibition field in deep violet
lenia raymarch 3D volumetric, radial basis function organisms, transmission rendering, magenta and cyan emission, deep space void background
orbium swarm lenia, 6 gliders on pure black, phosphorescent wake trails, minimal palette, white-hot cores, slow patient movement
lenia failure mode, delta_t explosion, white noise bloom, static organism, beautiful glitch, oversaturated field
